description: This permit application covers the installation of a fire-rated ceiling assembly in the parking garage of the structure. The ceiling assembly will meet the required fire protection standards, specifically utilizing a UL-listed system to ensure compliance with safety regulations. The installation will include all necessary materials and procedures to achieve the designated fire rating, providing enhanced fire resistance to protect the structural integrity of the garage. The project will follow all applicable building codes and safety guidelines to guarantee a secure and fire-protected environment.
